web.title: L'Antica Pizzeria da Michele in Naples - 2foodtrippers
web.description: L'Antica Pizzeria da Michele isn't just old. It's very old. The Condurro family starting making pizzas in 1870 and opened the current Naples location in 1930.

web.title: L'Antica Pizzeria da Michele | Authentic Neapolitan Pizza
web.description: Experience world-famous, authentic Neapolitan pizza & Italian cuisine in Los Angeles. Visit our stunning Hollywood and Long Beach Belmont Shore locations.

web.title: How do I make a reservation? - Tripadvisor
web.description: No reservations. Walk up and get a number. Once called you get seated. If you go before “regular” eating hours, waits are short.
